hero.title: Beyond intentions, results.
hero.subtitle: One platform to measure your impact and steer the transition of your supply chains.
process.3.text: **Reports** for the farm and for industry
stats.1.label: ha covered
stats.2.label: farms monitored
stats.3.label: diagnostics completed
audience.title: I am a…
audience.1.label: Farmer, crop manager or agronomic advisor
audience.1.title: Are you a farmer, crop manager or agronomic advisor?
audience.1.point.2: Get a **complete diagnosis of the farm's environmental impact**
audience.1.point.3: **Design your transition pathway and track your progress**
audience.1.point.4: Showcase your progress and impact to your buyers
audience.2.label: Cooperative, processor or distributor
audience.2.title: Are you a cooperative, processor or distributor?
audience.2.point.1: Collect reliable data from your agricultural raw material suppliers via the OpenCompass platform.
audience.2.point.2: Understand the real impact of your raw materials on ecosystems and human health
audience.2.point.3: Integrate these results into your environmental reports, certifications or responsible communications.
audience.3.label: Consultancy or eco-design advisory firm
audience.3.title: Are you a consultancy or eco-design advisory firm?
audience.3.point.1: Access the highest quality environmental data.
audience.3.point.3: Propose transition scenarios by measuring the environmental gains of different practices (regenerative agriculture, organic farming, organic-regenerative, etc.)
